style_summary: A bright mobile event poster style combining real city landmarks, soft fuzzy mascot characters, rounded app-card UI framing, bold white festival typography, date/location text, and friendly tourism-campaign energy.

environment_variables.EVENT_NAME: festival, fair, public event, or seasonal campaign name
environment_variables.CITY_OR_DISTRICT: city, neighborhood, district, park, harbor, library, plaza, or market area
environment_variables.PRIMARY_MASCOT: large plush or fuzzy mascot character
environment_variables.SECONDARY_MASCOT: smaller companion mascot, plush animal, toy pet, or childlike character
environment_variables.MASCOT_ACTION: running, waving, floating, guiding, dancing, holding a prop, or entering the city scene
environment_variables.LANDMARKS: recognizable city buildings, towers, stores, plaza, street, civic architecture, or destination icons
environment_variables.SKY_AND_WEATHER: bright blue sky, soft clouds, sunny weather, clear atmosphere
environment_variables.GROUND_PLANE: crosswalk, plaza, street, park path, waterfront walkway, or open event ground
environment_variables.TOP_MICRO_TEXT: small top label or festival series text
environment_variables.APP_UI_ELEMENTS: back arrow, three-dot menu, bottom sheet, rounded card, handle icon
environment_variables.COLOR_ACCENTS: mascot colors, clean sky blue, white typography, dark gray footer, soft civic neutrals
environment_variables.ASPECT_RATIO: 9:16 vertical mobile poster or 16:9 horizontal event banner

composition.layout_type: mobile app event card poster with rounded corners
composition.main_card: large rounded top visual card occupying most of the frame
composition.headline_position: big centered headline in the upper sky area
composition.headline_scale: large enough to read instantly on a phone screen
composition.mascot_position: mascots run or float in the lower-middle foreground, overlapping the city street or plaza
composition.landmark_position: landmarks sit behind the mascots, arranged like a cheerful city panorama
composition.date_position: large date range placed in the lower-right visual area or along the bottom card edge
composition.bottom_sheet: white rounded mobile bottom panel with handle icon and CTA text
composition.depth_layering: sky behind headline, landmarks in middle, mascots in foreground, UI text on top
